历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were 1303 → 1057 → 1102 → 1132 → 942, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 942, advancing about 190 places compared to 2024, reaching the highest level in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Shanxi Province from 2021 to 2025 was 115, 113, 115, 115, and 120 students respectively, expanding to 120 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 109 students, a decrease of 11 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.2%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking rose from 19th in 2021 to 14th in 2026, consistently ranking among the top elite science and engineering institutions in the country.
4. [Reputation Heat] During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation was slightly negative, involving teacher ethics incidents (Gong Lin, etc.), but the university's public relations response was relatively swift; Douyin heat ranking 47th (relatively hot), comprehensive heat 838,000, attention level moderately high; no record of enrollment gaps in recent years; fifth round of discipline evaluation A- and above: 12 disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanics A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Business Administration A-, Mathematics A-, Physics A-, highly matching with enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are all highly recommended, highly aligned with BIT's advantageous disciplines, continuously attracting high-scoring students; Shanxi Province's 2026 Physics Category examinees are approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 from 2025's 173,347 (-3.4%), slightly easing competition; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal; no local enrollment bias in this province, under the national competition pattern, Shanxi candidates' willingness to apply remains stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 942, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.2% leading to intensified competition, the continuous improvement of university level (Soft Science 14th) enhancing attractiveness, high alignment between advantageous disciplines and hot majors, the decrease of Shanxi Physics Category examinees by about 3.4% partially easing competition, and the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing heat, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking is approximately 905, with a range of 802–1008.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (802–1008), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 800), focus on applying for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Excellence Class and Future Precision Engineering Technology. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 1000), mainly choose Tier 3 majors like Information Science and Technology or Aerospace and Mechatronics, while also considering Tier 2.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 502, the 2026 expansion of about 11.1% easing competition, the significant 25.6% decrease in Shanxi History Category examinees further easing competition, the continuous improvement in school level enhancing attractiveness, the slightly negative reputation mildly suppressing popularity, and the polarization of liberal arts major popularity, the estimated minimum ranking for 2026 is about 555, with a range of 492–618.
